author: lOrm
content: Added PermissionContext enum (Interactive | SwarmWorker | Coordinator) and PermissionManager::check_with_context() in src/permissions.rs (#570). Allow/Deny paths are context-invariant; only the NeedsPrompt fall-through projects through context: Interactive yields NeedsPrompt (legacy behaviour), SwarmWorker and Coordinator yield Denied with a default-deny reason (no UI to consult). Coordinator variant reserved for the #619 coordinator-relay landing — today mirrors SwarmWorker. 4 tests pin: Interactive=NeedsPrompt, SwarmWorker=Denied, explicit-allow survives swarm worker context, Coordinator=Denied. Does NOT include: resolve-once guard for concurrent races (interactive handler), mailbox forwarding (swarm worker), sequential hook-then-classifier (coordinator) — those require the #507 coordinator subsystem to land first.
